dm11_init.message0: Initialize DM11 %1 I2C address %2 PWM frequency %3 Hz
dm11_init.tooltip: Initialize the DM11 motor driver module, default I2C address 0x15, default PWM frequency 1000Hz

dm11_pwm_duty.message0: DM11 %1 Set channel %2 PWM duty cycle to %3
dm11_pwm_duty.tooltip: Set the duty cycle of the specified PWM channel, ranging from 0-4095

dm11_motor_control.tooltip: Control the motor speed, positive value for forward rotation, negative value for reverse rotation, range -4095 to 4095

dm11_motor_stop.tooltip: Stop specified motor or all motors
